name: unraidpwa
description: PWA to control an unraid box: terminal with shortcuts + file explorer

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @unraidpwa/shared build && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @unraidpwa/shared build && pnpm --filter @unraidpwa/backend build && pnpm --filter @unraidpwa/frontend build
